# Copilot Instructions — pointer to AGENTS.md (AAIF SSOT)

SSOT = [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md). Read it first.

## Branching & Release
Model = **GitHub Flow (Class B — marketplace)**. See `AGENTS.md` §"Branching & Release Model" + `docs/adrs/ADR-002`. Never create environment branches here; never commit to `main` directly; PR → squash → delete-branch. Consumer source-pin = float per ADR-001.
